name: Green Gold Bean
recipeIngredient: 1 can (1 lb) cut green beans, drained
1 can (1 lb) cut wax beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the drained green beans, celery, and dill in a bowl.
2. Chill the mixture until ready to serve.
3. Just before serving, add the nuts, croutons, and dressing to the beans.
